item.title: A message to High School students:
item.description: Today is your last chance to donate at least 2 uniform items, if you want to dress down during exams. Uniforms must be brought to the main office by the end of day.

item.title: A message to Mme Bourdon:
item.description: I would like to thank the 7/8 student council and all the High School volunteers that came out to help during the year end BBQ. It is because of you that it was so successfull. A big thank you also goes out to Ms.Clement, Mrs Harding and Mrs Marcellus for helping us making this run as smooth as possible. Thank you.

item.title: Another message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: Some High School students were absent yesterday and didn't recieve their BBQ order. If your name is called please see Mme Bourdon at the beginning of lunch at the front foyer and she will have your food waiting for you.

item.title: A message for Mme. Laneville's Period 2 French class:
item.description: Please report directly to the library for class today.

item.title: A message to all grade 7 students:
item.description: Monday is the last days to bring your permission form for the year-end activity.
